news.t: Beat Volatility: The Power of Active ETFs
Active Natural Resources ETF TURF a Top-5 Performer YTD
T. ROWE PRICE ADDS THREE NEW TRANSPARENT SECTOR OFFERINGS TO ITS ACTIVE ETF ROSTER

holdings.infoBox: TURF is an equity ETF with a total of 88 individual holdings. The top holdings are Corteva stock at 5.41%, Exxon Mobil at 4.44%, Shell at 4.39%, Nutrien at 3.86%, and Yuan Renminbi Offshore at 3.69%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Natural Resource ETF (TURF) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 116.15m in AUM and 82 holdings. TURF is an actively managed ETF, aiming to outperform its respective sector index TURF was launched on Jun 11, 2025 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

data.title: Beat Volatility: The Power of Active ETFs
data.text: Active equity ETFs posted double-digit returns in April. Conflicting signals from the Federal Reserve and a fracture in global oil alliances created an environment where stock selection matters.

data.title: Active Natural Resources ETF TURF a Top-5 Performer YTD
data.text: Active ETFs are all the rage right now, even outpacing equity ETF flows last month across equities and fixed income, respectively. Amid that growing interest in active ETFs, certain performers have st...

data.title: T. ROWE PRICE ADDS THREE NEW TRANSPARENT SECTOR OFFERINGS TO ITS ACTIVE ETF ROSTER
